basic_details.job_title: ICMR NIHR Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Health Research, Bhubaneswar (ICMR NIHR)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.age_details: Max Age Limit: 35 years for YP-II (IT), 30 years for YP-I (Accounts). Age relaxation as per rules.
age_limit.details: Young Professional-II (IT): Maximum Age Limit is 35 years. Young Professional-I (Accounts): Maximum Age Limit is 30 years. Age relaxation as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Technology/IT/Computer Science with 3 years experience for YP-II (IT); B.Com/BBA with minimum 55% Marks and minimum one year post-qualification experience for YP-I (Accounts).
qualification.details: Young Professional-II (IT): Post Graduate in Technology / IT / Computer Science with 3 years experience. Young Professional-I (Accounts): B.Com/BBA (With minimum 55% Marks) from a recognized University/College. With minimum one year of post qualification experience in relevant field/subject.

salary_details.details: Young Professional-II (IT): Rs. 42,000.00 per month Young Professional-I (Accounts): Rs. 35,000.00 per month

selection_process: Shortlisting based on educational qualification and experience Written test and assignment (if necessary) Interview

all_official_links.label: Download ICMR NIHR Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Young Professional-II (IT) is scheduled for 30th June 2026, and for Young Professional-I (Accounts) on 1st July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on the respective dates.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Young Professional-II (IT) post?
faq.answer: For the Young Professional-II (IT) position, candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Technology, IT, or Computer Science with at least 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-I (Accounts) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Young Professional-I (Accounts) post is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-II (IT) position?
faq.answer: The consolidated emolument for the Young Professional-II (IT) post is Rs. 42,000.00 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by ICMR NIHR, Bhubaneswar, for the Young Professional-II (IT) and Young Professional-I (Accounts) positions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies of certificates, ID proof, educational qualifications, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification released by ICMR NIHR for these positions.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be held at the ICMR NIHR office in Bhubaneswar, Odisha. The exact address and timing will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Young Professional positions?
faq.answer: The Young Professional positions at ICMR NIHR, Bhubaneswar are on a temporary contract basis.
